scripts.package: docker build . -t cte-linux-amd64 --platform linux/amd64 && docker save -o cte-linux-amd64.tar cte-linux-amd64
scripts.containerised: npm run build && npm run compose
scripts.installs: npm install && npm run install-auth && npm run install-admin && npm run install-enforcement && npm run install-driver && npm run install-adminService && npm run install-marketing && npm run install-vehicleService && npm run install-ticketService
scripts.cis: npm ci && npm run ci-auth && npm run ci-adminService && npm run ci-ticketService
scripts.build: npm run build-auth && npm run build-admin && npm run build-enforcement && npm run build-driver && npm run build-adminService && npm run build-ticketService
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start-auth" "npm run start-adminService" "npm run start-ticketService"
scripts.lint: npm run lint-auth && npm run lint-admin && npm run lint-enforcement && npm run lint-driver && npm run lint-adminService && npm run lint-ticketService
scripts.test: npm run test-driver && npm run test-ticketService
